pr.title: docs: add live deployment URL to README
pr.body:
## Summary
- Adds the live Railway deployment link to the README intro so visitors can open the app directly.

## Test plan
- [ ] Confirm the README renders the link correctly on GitHub
- [ ] Verify https://sportscards.up.railway.app loads the app


Made with [Cursor](https://cursor.com)
pr.author: birdwell
